message:
🐛 Add card controls, fix badge layout, and improve version caching

Card consistency improvements:
- GitOpsDrift: Add CardControls with sortBy/sortDirection, pagination
- AlertRules: Add sortDirection toggle, proper usePagination hook
- TopPods: Add sortDirection toggle

UpgradeStatus reliability:
- Fetch cluster versions in parallel (faster loading)
- Track failed clusters separately for retry
- Auto-retry failed clusters every 15 seconds

NamespaceQuotas:
- Fix cluster badges wrapping to two rows
- Add flex-shrink-0 and truncation for long names

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
